form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 1.3 len at Saint-Cloud March 24 over 900m defeating Tokaido with 56.5kg at $3.20. Likely to be popular with punters and looks very tough to beat again.

form.formComment: Getting off the mark on debut; won by 6 len at Saint-Cloud March 19 over 900m on a soft track defeating Opium Of Success with 56.5kg at $5.50. Will take a lot from that run and is sure to play a big role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Getting off the mark on debut; won by 6 len at Saint-Cloud March 19 over 900m on a soft track defeating Opium Of Success with 56.5kg at $5.50. Will take a lot from that run and is sure to play a big role.

form.formComment: Claiming her maiden victory on debut; scored a big 6 len win at Saint-Cloud April 3 over 900m on a soft track defeating Mr Say with 53.5kg at $8.40. Shows good ability and can make it two on end.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Claiming her maiden victory on debut; scored a big 6 len win at Saint-Cloud April 3 over 900m on a soft track defeating Mr Say with 53.5kg at $8.40. Shows good ability and can make it two on end.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 2nd of 8 at Saint-Cloud on March 24 over 900m, 1.3 len behind Say Squirrel carrying 58kg at $4.10. Will derive great benefit from that experience and looks a great chance to break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9). Was well in the market at debut, 2nd of 8 at Saint-Cloud on March 24 over 900m, 1.3 len behind Say Squirrel carrying 58kg at $4.10. Will derive great benefit from that experience and looks a great chance to break through.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, second last of 12 at Saint-Cloud on April 3 over 900m, on a slow track; 21 len behind Aix Les Bains carrying 56.5kg at $44. Don't think he will trouble this field.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 8 at Saint-Cloud on March 24 over 900m, 5 len behind Say Squirrel carrying 56.5kg at $18. Has upside and can feature in the finish again.
